title: Packet 039 And Packet 040 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Reconciliation Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 039 closeout surfaces and Packet 040 decision surfaces through the parent-root `clean-main` authority boundary, then restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity again without mutating unrelated local or host drift.
dependency_note: Packet 039 was already published and host-reconciled in commit `192f0ae1ef59d4d3f66479189a1dc06d627096be`, but its local closeout plus the Packet 040 decision surfaces now exist only in the local parent-root worktree. Before any later cadence-planning or other Olares-first follow-on opens, that bounded authority set should be published and the host mirror should be restored to parity again.
scope: Publish only the Packet 039 closeout surfaces, Packet 040 decision surfaces, and the routing/roadmap/project-status updates that reference them.
Push those bounded authority updates to `origin/clean-main` without remote rewrite.
Reconcile `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit with non-destructive fast-forward-only steps.
constraints: Do not stage or publish unrelated local residue including `.vercelignore`, `tmp/`, or older Phase 5 and Packet 026 drift.
Do not mutate package manifests, lockfiles, app source, database schema, or runtime services.
Do not use force push, reset, clean, or destructive host cleanup.
Do not imply `ai_tasks` bridge implementation, Codex admission, or broader AI-services rollout.
validation: `git diff --cached --name-only` contains only the bounded publication scope.
Push to `origin/clean-main` succeeds without remote rewrite.
`/home/olares/code/apex` fast-forwards to the published commit and returns status count `0`.
commit_message: Publish Olares AI workflow packet 039 and 040 authority
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06. Packet 041 published the local Packet 039 closeout surfaces and Packet 040 decision surfaces plus the Packet 041 draft authority in commit `b037df57a823eb4898b32897ae3e1534a9108ee5`, pushed `origin/clean-main` without remote rewrite, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from `192f0ae1ef59d4d3f66479189a1dc06d627096be` to clean parity at `b037df57a823eb4898b32897ae3e1534a9108ee5`. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained observe-only at status count `30`.
next_packet_candidate: none - lane parked at stable published boundary
next_action: No additional Olares packet is required now. Reopen the lane only if the current minimal MCP trio plus `apex-jobs` operating model shows a concrete insufficiency or a new bounded authority objective is selected.
